name: No witnesses to my slip at work - claim doomed?

mainEntity.name: No witnesses to my slip at work - claim doomed?

acceptedAnswer.description: No, medical records and surveillance can suffice.[3] Context: Self-reported ok if consistent with evidence.[3] Key factors: Photos of hazard; prior complaints. Practical guidance: Note details immediately; doctor corroborate story. Many solo claims win. Build circumstantial case.
